<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="g8hVLSLopTohT7oolbI6" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-375" dy="-317" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="700" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="fetchPage(url)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="210" x="160" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Domain blocked?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="160" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Return: blocked error" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="440" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Cache HIT?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="160" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Return cached result" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="440" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="github.com?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="210" x="160" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="GitHub API fetch
